openrecon-mitm.description: Vendored mitmproxy-mcp + local iOS addons. Exposes the proxy as MCP tools (start_proxy, replay_flow, extract_from_flow, fuzz_endpoint, detect_auth_pattern, etc.).

openrecon-r2.description: radare2 static analysis MCP server. Tools: r2_open, r2_functions, r2_strings, r2_xrefs, r2_imports, r2_classes, r2_entitlements, r2_decompile, r2_disasm, r2_search_bytes. Requires `pip install -e .[r2]` and `r2 -v`.

openrecon-r2frida.description: r2frida live process MCP server. Tools: r2f_attach, r2f_classes, r2f_methods, r2f_modules, r2f_search_heap, r2f_memdump, r2f_trace, r2f_eval. Requires `r2pm -ci r2frida` + frida-server on device.
